description: This file controls the item modifiers of gems and runes for each item type. This file is used by the following files: armor, weapons, misc. Any column field name starting with "*" is considered a comment field and is not used by the game.
source: Colonnes du .txt (BKVince 3.2) ; types/descriptions du guide TXT eezstreet-d2rdoc.

columns.name: name
columns.description: This is a reference field to define the gem/rune name

columns.name: letter
columns.description: Defines the string that is concatenated together in the item tooltip when a rune is socketed into an item

columns.name: transform
columns.description: Controls the color change of the item after being socketed by the gem/rune. (Corresponds to colors.Code)

columns.name: code
columns.description: Links this entry to a specific item's code.

columns.name: weaponMod1Code
columns.description: Controls the item properties that the gem/rune provides when socketed into an item with a misc.gemapplytype value that equals (weapon=0, helm=1, shield=2) References a properties.code or a PropertyGroups.code

columns.name: weaponMod1Param
columns.description: The stat's "parameter" value associated with the listed property. Usage depends on the property function (See properties.func#) A number or references skills.skill, montype.type, or states.state

columns.name: weaponMod1Min
columns.description: The stat's "min" value associated with the listed property. Usage depends on the property function (See properties.func#)

columns.name: weaponMod1Max
columns.description: The stat's "max" value associated with the listed property. Usage depends on the property function (See properties.func#)
